name: Save DOCX
description: Saves DataFrame responses as DOCX files

fields.name: outputPath
fields.title: Output Path
fields.description: Path where to save the DOCX files (local or S3)

fields.name: content
fields.title: Content Column
fields.description: DataFrame column containing content for output files

fields.name: saveMode
fields.title: Save Mode
fields.description: Whether to Append, Overwrite, Error if the path Exists, or Ignore

fields.name: generic_file_name
fields.title: Default File Name
fields.description: Default docx file name where the DOCX will be saved

fields.name: fileNameCol
fields.title: File Name Column
fields.description: DataFrame column containing filenames for output files (used in separate files or page number modes)

fields.name: pageNumberCol
fields.title: Page Number Column
fields.description: DataFrame column containing page numbers for multi-page documents (used in page number mode)

fields.name: translateFileName
fields.title: Translate File Name
fields.description: Translates file names to be saved from any language to English
